summary_sections.title: Overview
summary_sections.content_html: Atomic Models and Energy Levels is a key topic in Modern Physics for AP Physics 2.

summary_sections.title: Key Concepts
summary_sections.content_html: This lesson covers the fundamental principles of atomic models and energy levels.

summary_sections.title: Applications
summary_sections.content_html: Understanding atomic models and energy levels has applications in various areas of physics and engineering.
